introSection: Crazy 8's is a steel spinning indoor kiddie roller coaster currently located at John's Incredible Pizza in Carson, California, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Crazy 8's originally debuted during the 2017 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA. It was eventually sold to John's Incredible Pizza, opening with their Carson location in 2019.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars are designed with green trains with the seats being purple, and yellow being used for the front of the car as well as an accent color. green is also used as an accent color for the inside of the cars & front of the car.

fullText:
Crazy 8's is a steel spinning indoor kiddie roller coaster currently located at John's Incredible Pizza in Carson, California, USA.

Crazy 8's originally debuted during the 2017 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA. It was eventually sold to John's Incredible Pizza, opening with their Carson location in 2019.



Purple track and yellow supports.

The cars are designed with green trains with the seats being purple, and yellow being used for the front of the car as well as an accent color. green is also used as an accent color for the inside of the cars & front of the car.
